planner: set -o pipefail; cat {prompt_file} | gemini -p '' --approval-mode yolo --model gemini-3.1-pro-preview --output-format json | python3 /home/docker/agentHub/workspaces/main/scripts/ai_json_to_markdown.py --provider gemini --output {plan_path}
planner_fallback: set -o pipefail; cat {prompt_file} | gemini -p '' --approval-mode yolo --model gemini-3.1-pro-preview --output-format json | python3 /home/docker/agentHub/workspaces/main/scripts/ai_json_to_markdown.py --provider gemini --output {plan_path}
reviewer: set -o pipefail; cat {prompt_file} | gemini -p '' --approval-mode yolo --model gemini-3.1-pro-preview --output-format json | python3 /home/docker/agentHub/workspaces/main/scripts/ai_json_to_markdown.py --provider gemini --output {review_path}
reviewer_fallback: set -o pipefail; cat {prompt_file} | gemini -p '' --approval-mode yolo --model gemini-3.1-pro-preview --output-format json | python3 /home/docker/agentHub/workspaces/main/scripts/ai_json_to_markdown.py --provider gemini --output {review_path}
copilot: if command -v copilot >/dev/null 2>&1; then copilot -p "$(cat {prompt_file})"; elif command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then cat {prompt_file} | claude --print; else echo "Copilot/Claude CLI not available"; exit 1; fi
commit_summary: set -o pipefail; cat {prompt_file} | claude --print --output-format json | python3 /home/docker/agentHub/workspaces/main/scripts/ai_json_to_markdown.py --provider claude --output {commit_message_path}
pr_summary: set -o pipefail; cat {prompt_file} | claude --print --output-format json | python3 /home/docker/agentHub/workspaces/main/scripts/ai_json_to_markdown.py --provider claude --output {pr_summary_path}
escalation: set -o pipefail; cat {prompt_file} | claude --print --output-format json | python3 /home/docker/agentHub/workspaces/main/scripts/ai_json_to_markdown.py --provider claude --output ESCALATION.md
